## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Yousef to the user manual creation process for new hires at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The onboarding tool automates account creation, welcome emails, and system access for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Manual intervention may be needed for off-cycle onboarding or early access requests](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Troubleshooting steps were demonstrated when encountering unexpected issues (e.g., duplicate user error)](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Regular onboarding occurs automatically every Thursday at 9am PST for upcoming week's new hires](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Tool Walkthrough

  - [Access via Slack bookmarks in the onboarding channel](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - ["Refresh onboarding list" fetches latest user data from deal](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - ["Onboard user now" initiates manual onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Tool sends authentication link via Slack (valid for 15 minutes)](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Allows selection of one or multiple users to onboard](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Verifies user information before proceeding](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Automated vs. Manual Onboarding

  - [Automatic onboarding runs Thursdays at 9am PST for next week's starts](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Manual onboarding needed for:](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
    1.  Early access requests (e.g., Tyler, starting in 2 weeks)
    2.  Late additions to the system (added after Thursday, starting before next auto-run)

### Troubleshooting

  - [Encountered "Entity already exists" error for Tyler](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Possible causes: manual account creation or system glitch](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Resolution: Manually triggered email resend](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Best practice: Wait \~1 minute for Slack confirmation; if issues persist, contact Yousef](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Welcome Email Process

  - [System generates and sends welcome email automatically](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Email contains essential onboarding information](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Delay experienced in this session, but email eventually arrived](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Both Alice and Yousef should receive copies for verification](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to monitor for Tyler's welcome email arrival and notify Yousef if not received](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Yousef to create a Loom video for the onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Alice to use the manual onboarding tool only for off-cycle or early access cases](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Team to investigate the cause of the duplicate user error for process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/yzVY7-7gBswWx4JaxXYgSB3178d16jn8?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
